ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Note: MP3 file generation is not available on mobile devices due to file system limitations. However, you can still use the audio playback feature to listen to your notes.
ast.target: 注意： 由于文件系统限制，移动设备上无法生成 MP3 文件。 但您仍然可以使用音频播放功能来收听您的笔记。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Text filtering controls what content is removed from your notes before generating speech. This helps ensure clean, readable narration by filtering out formatting elements that don't translate well to speech.
ast.target: 文本过滤 控制在生成语音之前从笔记中移除哪些内容。 这有助于通过过滤掉不适合语音朗读的格式元素，确保生成清晰、可读的叙述。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Symbol replacement converts comparison symbols like > and < into words to prevent XML parsing issues in TTS generation. You can choose from built-in languages or create custom replacements.
ast.target: 符号替换 将比较符号（如 > 和 <）转换为文字， 以防止 TTS 生成过程中出现 XML 解析问题。您可以选择内置语言或 创建自定义替换规则。

ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 接受 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制设置高于 125 fps 的帧率

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change playback speed multiplier (ex. 0.5 = 0.5x playback speed (50% speed)). Default = 1.0
ast.target: 更改播放速度倍数（例如，0.5 = 0.5倍播放速度（50%速度））。默认值 = 1.0

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle notices for processing status and errors.
ast.target: 切换处理状态和错误的通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle playback button in the status bar.
ast.target: 切换状态栏中的播放按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle menu items in the file and editor menus.
ast.target: 切换文件和编辑器菜单中的菜单项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the floating playback control popover during audio playback.
ast.target: 在音频播放期间隐藏浮动播放控制弹出窗口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep playback controls open after audio finishes to allow replaying.
ast.target: 音频播放结束后保持播放控件打开，以便允许重播。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the playback queue functionality including queue manager and queue-related commands.
ast.target: 启用播放队列功能，包括队列管理器和队列相关命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically pause playback when Obsidian loses focus and resume when it regains focus.
ast.target: 当Obsidian失去焦点时自动暂停播放，当它重新获得焦点时恢复播放。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable option to select "Generate MP3" in the file and editor menus.
ast.target: 启用在文件和编辑器菜单中选择“生成MP3”的选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the folder to save generated MP3 files.
ast.target: 指定保存生成的MP3文件的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Embed a link to the generated MP3 file in the note.
ast.target: 在笔记中嵌入指向生成的MP3文件的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replaces spaces in mp3 file name with underscores (used for system compatibility).
ast.target: 将MP3文件名中的空格替换为下划线（用于系统兼容性）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable access to experimental features that may not be fully stable. These features are gated behind this toggle for safety.
ast.target: 启用访问可能不完全稳定的实验性功能。出于安全考虑，这些功能被此开关限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show fewer notification popups on mobile devices to reduce screen clutter. Disable this for more verbose feedback.
ast.target: 在移动设备上显示更少的通知弹出窗口以减少屏幕杂乱。禁用此项可获得更详细的反馈。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove YAML frontmatter (metadata between --- delimiters) from the beginning of notes.
ast.target: 从笔记开头移除YAML前置内容（---分隔符之间的元数据）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove markdown links [text](url) completely. When enabled, both the link text and URL are removed.
ast.target: 完全移除markdown链接 [文本](URL)。启用后，链接文本和URL都会被移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove Obsidian wiki-style links [[link]] and keep only the display text.
ast.target: 移除Obsidian wiki风格链接 [[链接]]，仅保留显示文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 完全移除围栏代码块（```代码```）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove backtick markers from inline code (`code`) while keeping the code text.
ast.target: 移除内联代码（`代码`）的反引号标记，同时保留代码文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 移除图片嵌入 ![替代文本](URL) 和附件 ![[图片.png]]。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove Obsidian callout blocks (> [!note], > [!warning], etc.) while keeping the content.
ast.target: 移除Obsidian标注块（> [!note]、> [!warning]等），同时保留内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove highlight markers ==text== while keeping the highlighted text.
ast.target: 移除高亮标记 ==文本==，同时保留高亮文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove footnote references [^1] and footnote definitions.
ast.target: 移除脚注引用 [^1] 和脚注定义。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove HTML comments <!-- comment --> and Obsidian comments %%comment%%.
ast.target: 移除HTML注释 <!-- 注释 --> 和Obsidian注释 %%注释%%。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 移除LaTeX数学表达式（$行内$ 和 $$块$$）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove HTML tags while preserving the text content.
ast.target: 移除HTML标签，同时保留文本内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace < and > symbols with words to prevent XML parsing issues with multiple symbols on the same line. Language and text can be customized in Symbol Replacement section below.
ast.target: 将 < 和 > 符号替换为文字，以防止同一行中多个符号导致XML解析问题。语言和文本可在下方的“符号替换”部分自定义。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the language for symbol replacement words. "Auto" detects from your Obsidian interface language, with browser locale as fallback.
ast.target: 选择符号替换文字的语言。“自动”从您的Obsidian界面语言检测，以浏览器区域设置作为备用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to define your own replacement text instead of using built-in language translations.
ast.target: 启用以定义您自己的替换文本，而不是使用内置的语言翻译。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to replace ">" symbols with (e.g., " greater than ", " maior que ")
ast.target: 用于替换“>”符号的文本（例如，“大于”、“maior que”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to replace "<" symbols with (e.g., " less than ", " menor que ")
ast.target: 用于替换“<”符号的文本（例如，“小于”、“menor que”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to replace ">=" symbols with (e.g., " greater than or equal to ")
ast.target: 用于替换“>=”符号的文本（例如，“大于或等于”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to replace "<=" symbols with (e.g., " less than or equal to ")
ast.target: 用于替换“<=”符号的文本（例如，“小于或等于”）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show file and editor menu items
ast.target: 显示文件和编辑器菜单项

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 将选中内容添加到队列

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ws library not available, using native WebSocket without headers
ast.target: ws 库不可用，正在使用不带请求头的原生 WebSocket。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Proxy support in isomorphic environment is limited. Consider using a backend proxy.
ast.target: 在同构环境中代理支持有限。建议使用后端代理。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Instance method `debug.destroy()` is deprecated and no longer does anything. It will be removed in the next major version of `debug`.
ast.target: 实例方法 `debug.destroy()` 已弃用且不再执行任何操作。它将在 `debug` 的下一个主要版本中移除。

ast.source: Create audio narration for your Obsidian notes using our free mobile app.
ast.target: 使用我们的免费移动应用，为您的 Obsidian 笔记创建音频叙述。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please star this project on GitHub if you find it useful ⭐️
ast.target: 如果您觉得这个项目有用，请在 GitHub 上给我们点个星 ⭐️

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure what content is filtered from notes before speech generation. Click to expand options.
ast.target: 配置在语音生成前从笔记中过滤哪些内容。点击展开选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure how comparison symbols are replaced with words in different languages. Click to expand options.
ast.target: 配置如何用不同语言的词语替换比较符号。点击展开选项。
